Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tap version:', d.get\('version','?'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) pkgs = d.get\('packages',{}\) keys = [k for k in pkgs if 'tap' in k.lower\(\) or 'langchain' in k.lower\(\) or 'pinecone' in k.lower\(\)] for k in sorted\(keys\)[:20]: print\(k, pkgs[k].get\('version','?'\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tapjs/core version:', d.get\('version','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\)")
